grade_rationale: 3 P1 findings exceed C threshold of max_p1: 2
skip_reason: Backend and frontend services offline during audit window

escalations.title: Handlebars JavaScript Injection (multiple vectors)
escalations.fix: Update handlebars to 4.7.9+ or add overrides in package.json

escalations.title: path-to-regexp Regular Expression Denial of Service
escalations.fix: npm update path-to-regexp in platform/orchestrator (may require Express update)

backlog.title: 40 FR IDs implemented with no canonical Specification
backlog.detail: FR-070..FR-095 (26), FR-DUP-01..FR-DUP-13 (13), FR-0001 (1) exist only in Plans files. Specifications/dev-workflow-platform.md stops at FR-069.
backlog.recommendation: Back-port FR-070..FR-095 and FR-DUP-01..FR-DUP-13 into Specifications/dev-workflow-platform.md. Normalize FR-0001 to FR-001.

backlog.title: FR-dependency-api-types: blocked_by field missing from shared types
backlog.detail: UpdateBugInput and UpdateFeatureRequestInput missing blocked_by?: string[]. DependencyPicker uses 'as any' casts as workaround.
backlog.recommendation: Add blocked_by?: string[] to both interfaces in portal/Shared/api.ts. Remove the two 'as any' casts in DependencyPicker.tsx.

backlog.title: FR-dependency-seed: seed.ts does not exist
backlog.detail: No seed.ts in portal/Backend/src/database/. Dependency seed data never loaded on startup.
backlog.recommendation: Create portal/Backend/src/database/seed.ts with idempotent seeding. Wire into index.ts startup after schema migration.

backlog.title: FR-dependency-frontend-tests: DependencySection and BlockedBadge test files missing
backlog.detail: Both test files are missing. DependencySection (blocked-by/blocks lists, chip navigation, edit button) and BlockedBadge (red/amber/none states) have zero coverage.
backlog.recommendation: Create both test files with // Verifies: traceability comments for FR-dependency-section and FR-dependency-blocked-badge.

backlog.title: Direct SQL in teamDispatches route handler + zero traceability comments
backlog.detail: Raw db.prepare(...).all() SQL executed directly in route handler. Zero Verifies comments. Violates 'no direct DB calls from route handlers' rule.
backlog.recommendation: Extract SQL into teamDispatchService.ts. Add // Verifies: comments.

backlog.title: Traceability enforcer gate covers only 13 of 100+ requirements
backlog.detail: Enforcer auto-selects most recently modified requirements.md (FR-WF-001..013 only). Portal's 85+ FRs never validated. Gate passes silently while 90%+ of requirements go unchecked.
backlog.recommendation: Add --all-plans flag or create consolidated requirements-all.md. Add second enforcer invocation targeting Plans/dev-workflow-platform/requirements.md.

backlog.title: UUID missing buffer bounds check
backlog.recommendation: npm install uuid@^14.0.0 in Source/Backend. Update dockerode in orchestrator to 4.0.2+.

backlog.title: Express.js major version gap (4.x current, 5.x available)
backlog.recommendation: Plan Express 5.x migration sprint. Review breaking changes before upgrade.

backlog.title: FR-TMP-008 missing Verifies comment in Dockerfile.worker
backlog.recommendation: Add # Verifies: FR-TMP-008 comment to relevant lines in Dockerfile.worker.

backlog.title: TeamsPage has no test file
backlog.recommendation: Create portal/Frontend/tests/TeamsPage.test.tsx covering team dispatch list render, filtering, loading/error states.

backlog.title: 3 eslint-disable suppressions without justification comments
backlog.recommendation: Add inline comment justifying each eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps suppression.

backlog.title: Brace expansion DoS (CVSS 6.5) — transitive in Source/Backend
backlog.recommendation: Update parent packages pulling in brace-expansion to use 1.1.13+.

backlog.title: Frontend test tooling — vite/vitest/esbuild ecosystem moderate CVEs (5 packages)
backlog.recommendation: Run npm update in Source/Frontend to refresh vite/vitest chain.

backlog.title: React 18.3 → 19.x (1 major version behind)
backlog.recommendation: Non-critical; test thoroughly — React 19 may have behavioral changes.

backlog.title: React Router 6.x → 7.x (1 major version behind)
backlog.recommendation: Check 7.x release notes; navigation API changes expected.

backlog.title: Pino 8.x → 10.x (2 major versions behind)
backlog.recommendation: Review 9.x and 10.x breaking changes; test in staging before upgrade.

backlog.title: Multer 1.x LTS → 2.x
backlog.recommendation: Plan upgrade; file upload handling may differ in 2.x.

cross_references.root_cause: No automated dependency scanning in CI/CD
cross_references.fix: Add npm audit --audit-level=high as CI pre-merge gate; configure Dependabot for all 4 projects

cross_references.root_cause: Incomplete spec governance — traceability tooling doesn't cover full requirement set
cross_references.fix: Back-port FRs to Specifications/; extend tools/traceability-enforcer.py to scan all requirements.md files
Single TheFixer ticket: add blocked_by to types + create seed.ts + create 2 test files
